A person's accomplishments determine their worth.
All personnel, monitor the surrounding area!
Stop at once! Humans are capable of much more than war!
Hey, come on! Stay sharp or you're getting blown up!
Please come back alive.
Engines, full speed! We can't let them get away!
I rather dislike waiting. Time to end this!
I-I promise not to hold everyone back...!
Don't give the enemy another inch!
Just stop it! I've had enough of your attitude!

I've got a few moves.
Time I showed them!
I will see to it that you are dead and buried!
Everyone, please entrust me with your lives.
Keep the Earth Sphere out of this!

If the same mistakes are about to be repeated,
then this is what I must do!
Go on, do it! They're a bunch of phonies, anyway!
I can't sit back and watch any longer...！
Hehehe!
What kind of a person lusts for war!?
I'll show you how tough battle is!
I don't want the future to be filled with sadness...！
I cannot allow that tragedy to be repeated...
Even if it's useless, we've got to get through！
I've prepared myself too！
Things would be so much better if you just retreat!
Ahahaha! Now we're talking!
I have the skill to do the job I've been given!
This is the moment of truth! I hope you're ready!

We're making enemies of the world.
It's wrong, but...
There must be something I can do!
I'm not letting either of you get in the way of my revenge!
It's time to show 'em what we space rats can do！
There's not much I can do to help, but I must...
There are appropriate ways of putting down such a dangerous beast.
I've got to do whatever I can to help!
This is my fight!
Power is countered by magic, and magic by power. That's the basic rule of battle.
